ns1:revision.ns1:text:
'''Server support for kernels: '''
*RHEL 7.4 (3.10.0-693.11.6.el7) '''Client support for unpatched kernels: '''
*RHEL 6.9 (2.6.32-696.18.7.el6) *RHEL 7.4 (3.10.0-693.11.6.el7) *SLES12 SP2 (4.4.103-92.53) *Ubuntu 16.04 (4.4.0-98) '''Recommended e2fsprogs version: '''
*v1.42.13.wc6 '''Interoperability Support: '''
*Clients & Servers: Latest 2.9.X == Issues fixed between 2.10.2 and 2.10.3 == ''' New Feature ''' *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8235 LU-8235]: Add pool awareness to lfs_migrate ''' Improvement ''' *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7251 LU-7251]: reduce commit callbacks in OSP *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7340 LU-7340]: ChangeLogs catalog full condition should be handled more gracefully *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7991 LU-7991]: Add project quota for ZFS *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8649 LU-8649]: Print console message in recovery when waiting for first client *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9558 LU-9558]: Support linux kernel version 4.12 *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9946 LU-9946]: Have fileset on default nodemap *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10256 LU-10256]: Provide optional <archive_id> argument for lfs hsm_set and lfs hsm_clear *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10516 LU-10516]: Update recommended e2fsprogs version ''' Bugs ''' *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-618 LU-618]: Reads are not included in IO accounting *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-4134 LU-4134]: obdfilter-suvery bugs and panics (ioctl API isn't protected over shutdown/setup property). *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-5020 LU-5020]: OST can be all mounted successfully in parallel mount scenario *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-5024 LU-5024]: (mdc_lib.c:163:mdc_pack_name()) ASSERTION( cpy_len == name_len && lu_name_is_valid_2(buf, cpy_len) ) failed: *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-5680 LU-5680]: sanity-hsm uses /etc/motd (which is probably of size 0) *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7988 LU-7988]: HSM: high lock contention for cdt_llog_lock *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8653 LU-8653]: broken inheritance of default striping *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9052 LU-9052]: lod_verify_md_striping()) lsh-MDT0000-mdtlov: invalid lmv_user_md: magic = cd20cd0 *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9145 LU-9145]: When Shared Key feature is active, Nodemap admin property allows more access *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9509 LU-9509]: parallel-scale-stress-hw_compilebench test stuck: timeout 2hours, usually takes < 40 minutes. *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9535 LU-9535]: Interop 2.9<->master sanityn test_77j: failed to set TBF OPCode policy *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9611 LU-9611]: fix default stripe count/offset proc tunables *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9660 LU-9660]: reduce ptlrpcd wakeups on idle system *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9872 LU-9872]: parallel-scale-nfsv3 test_connectathon: connectathon failed: 1 *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9887 LU-9887]: sanity-lfsck test_9a: FAIL: (4) Got speed 952, expected less than 144 *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9892 LU-9892]: parallel-scale-nfsv3 no sub tests failed: setup nfs failed! *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9894 LU-9894]: lfsck always prints that it started all types of lfsck *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9966 LU-9966]: sanity test_411: fail to trigger a memory allocation error *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9967 LU-9967]: sanity test_60a: Module llog_test is in use *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9983 LU-9983]: LBUG llog_osd.c:327:llog_osd_declare_write_rec() - all DNE MDS *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9997 LU-9997]: Suspicious assert check in ldlm_cli_cancel *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9998 LU-9998]: Default partition setup is not optimal for best metadata performance *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10005 LU-10005]: File creation to slave MDT is much slower than primary MDT on DNE1 configuration *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10011 LU-10011]: suppress annoying messages for lfs quota *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10089 LU-10089]: kiblnd_fmr_pool_map() Failed to map mr 10/11 elements *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10098 LU-10098]: Lustre resource agent can mis-identify resource mounts *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10134 LU-10134]: LBUG lfsck_namespace_double_scan()) ASSERTION( list_empty(&lad->lad_req_list) ) failed: *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10161 LU-10161]: lbuild: Failed to determine the default route interface *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10217 LU-10217]: Sanity 248 fails with newer dd output *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10232 LU-10232]: kernel BUG at cl_object.c:206! *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10237 LU-10237]: "ls" hangs on a particular directory *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10255 LU-10255]: sanity 129 wrong comparison operator used *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10267 LU-10267]: Wrong poll() returned revents for changelog device *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10268 LU-10268]: rcu_sched self-detected stall in lfsck *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10297 LU-10297]: parallel-scale-nfsv4 test_metabench: ASSERTION( nfound <= inuse->op_count ) failed *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10301 LU-10301]: kernel update [RHEL7.4 3.10.0-693.11.1.el7] *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10327 LU-10327]: sanity-hsm, test_24c: cannot chown '/mnt/lustre/d24c.sanity-hsm/f24c.sanity-hsm' to '500:nobody' *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10330 LU-10330]: Interop sanity test_101g: unable to set max_pages_per_rpc=4M *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10341 LU-10341]: kkuc shoud send HALs only to suitable CTs *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10346 LU-10346]: utils: mkfs.lustre compiled from the git repositery references a missing lib *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10357 LU-10357]: ll_ioc_copy_{start,end}() depend on search_inode_for_lustre() which is bad *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10371 LU-10371]: Kernel >= 4.8 has no posix_acl_xattr_entry a_entries[0] *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10371 LU-10377]: Update ZFS Version to 0.7.5 *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10392 LU-10392]: LustreError: 82980:0:(fid_handler.c:329:__seq_server_alloc_meta()) srv-lglossy-MDT0002: Allocated super-sequence failed: rc = -115 *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10399 LU-10399]: sanity-hsm test_1b uses /dev/random *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10425 LU-10425]: kernel update [SLES12 SP3 4.4.103-6.33] *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10427 LU-10427]: kernel update [SLES12 SP2 4.4.103-92.53] *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10444 LU-10444]: l_getidentity keeps remount /sys/kernel/debug and reverting permissions. *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10455 LU-10455]: kernel update [RHEL7.4 3.10.0-693.11.6.el7] *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10456 LU-10456]: kernel update [RHEL6.9 2.6.32-696.18.7.el6] *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10458 LU-10458]: kernel update [SLES12 SP3 4.4.103-6.38] *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10464 LU-10464]: kernel update [SLES12 SP2 4.4.103-92.56] ''' Task ''' *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-6210 LU-6210]: change positional struct initializers to C99 initializers ''' Technical task ''' *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10248 LU-10248]: Need to update PFID of OST objects after layout change ''' Question/Request ''' *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9594 LU-9594]: sanity test cases 42a-d 45 68 76 407 65ic remove from ALWAYS_EXCEPT [[Category:Releases]]
